paragraphs.text: Three days of sessions, workshops, and keynotes on industrial resilience and supply-chain innovation. May 14–16, 2025 · Pittsburgh, PA

Schedule subject to minor changes. Workshops on Day Three require an add-on ticket and have limited capacity — register early to reserve a seat. Captioning and accessibility services available on request at access@ironcladfutures.org.

Program Three days of sessions, workshops, and keynotes on industrial resilience and supply-chain innovation.
